# konnect_metering_customer (Resource)

MeteringCustomer Resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "konnect_metering_customer" "my_meteringcustomer" {
  billing_address = {
    city         = "...my_city..."
    country      = "US"
    line1        = "...my_line1..."
    line2        = "...my_line2..."
    phone_number = "...my_phone_number..."
    postal_code  = "...my_postal_code..."
    state        = "...my_state..."
  }
  currency    = "USD"
  description = "...my_description..."
  key         = "019ae40f-4258-7f15-9491-842f42a7d6ac"
  labels = {
    key = "value"
  }
  name          = "...my_name..."
  primary_email = "...my_primary_email..."
  usage_attribution = {
    subject_keys = [
    ]
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `key` (String) ExternalResourceKey is a unique string that is used to identify a resource in an
external system.
Requires replacement if changed.
- `name` (String) Display name of the resource.

Between 1 and 256 characters.

### Optional

- `billing_address` (Attributes) The billing address of the customer. Used for tax and invoicing. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--billing_address))
- `currency` (String) Currency of the customer. Used for billing, tax and invoicing.
- `description` (String) Optional description of the resource.

Maximum 1024 characters.
- `labels` (Map of String) Labels store metadata of an entity that can be used for filtering an entity list or for searching across entity types. 

Keys must be of length 1-63 characters, and cannot start with "kong", "konnect", "mesh", "kic", or "_".
- `primary_email` (String) The primary email address of the customer.
- `usage_attribution` (Attributes) Mapping to attribute metered usage to the customer by the event subject. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--usage_attribution))

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) An ISO-8601 timestamp representation of entity creation date.
- `deleted_at` (String) An ISO-8601 timestamp representation of entity deletion date.
- `id` (String) ULID (Universally Unique Lexicographically Sortable Identifier).
- `updated_at` (String) An ISO-8601 timestamp representation of entity last update date.

<a id="nestedatt--billing_address"></a>
### Nested Schema for `billing_address`

Required:

- `country` (String) Country code in [ISO 3166-1](https://www.iso.org/iso-3166-country-codes.html)
alpha-2 format.

Optional:

- `city` (String) City.
- `line1` (String) First line of the address.
- `line2` (String) Second line of the address.
- `phone_number` (String) Phone number.
- `postal_code` (String) Postal code.
- `state` (String) State or province.


<a id="nestedatt--usage_attribution"></a>
### Nested Schema for `usage_attribution`

Required:

- `subject_keys` (List of String) The subjects that are attributed to the customer. Can be empty when no usage
event subjects are associated with the customer.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = konnect_metering_customer.my_konnect_metering_customer
  id = "01G65Z755AFWAKHE12NY0CQ9FH"
}
```

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import konnect_metering_customer.my_konnect_metering_customer "01G65Z755AFWAKHE12NY0CQ9FH"
```
